THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MONEY GRAM INTERNATIONAL RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT NABOYEV, ROBERT $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,080.00, PLAINTIFF HAS ADMITTED OWING DEFENDANT THE MONEY. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO TRANSFER CASE TO COURT OF GENERAL JURISDICTION IS DENIEDM, ONLY THE $5,000.00 CLAIMS AGAINST NABOYEV IN CASE #493304 HAVE BEEN RESOLVED. THE CLAIMS RESLOVED TODAY HAVE NOTHING TO DO WITH THE CLAIMS IN CASE #461439. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
